name: Hot Tuna Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces tuna in oil, drained and flaked
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tuna, cheese, eggs, chopped green pepper, sweet pickle, ripe olives, and onion with mayonnaise.
2. Spread about 1/3 cup of the mixture onto each bun.
3. Wrap each sandwich in waxed paper.
4. Microwave on high for 30-45 seconds per sandwich, or until the cheese melts.
